LightningComponentBundle.description: Select, reorder, and configure document conversion options

property.name: apiKey
property.label: API Key
property.description: API key for the doc converter service

property.name: endpointUrl
property.label: Endpoint URL
property.description: Base URL of the doc converter service

property.name: sfClientId
property.label: SF Client ID
property.description: Connected App Consumer Key for API access

property.name: sfClientSecret
property.label: SF Client Secret
property.description: Connected App Consumer Secret for API access

property.name: outputFileName
property.label: Output File Name
property.description: User-entered filename for the output PDF

property.name: mergeFiles
property.label: Merge Files
property.description: Whether to merge all files into one PDF

property.name: uploadIndividual
property.label: Upload Individual
property.description: Whether to upload individual converted PDFs

property.name: deleteOriginals
property.label: Delete Originals
property.description: Whether to delete original non-PDF files after conversion
